top_signals.title: EM Stocks Head for Weekly Gain on AI Rally and Iran Hopes
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market stocks extended gains for a second day as investors kept piling into artificial intelligence-related stocks and optimism grew that the US and Iran may be moving closer to a peace deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: IMO Adopts Global Code for Autonomous Ships
top_signals.summary: The IMO has adopted a new International Code of Safety for Maritime Autonomous Surface Ships (MASS Code) at the 111th session of the Maritime Safety Committee in London.The MASS Code aims to support the safe integration of autonomous and remotely operated commercial ships into global shipping.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Earlier broker liability victory for Echo sent back to lower court after Montgomery
top_signals.summary:
Echo Global will once again face a South Carolina court following a judge’s order tied to Montgomery.

The post Earlier broker liability victory for Echo sent back to lower court after Montgomery appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Crypto bros, scalpers and Logan Paul: Inside the world of Pokémon where cards are sold for millions
top_signals.summary: A Pokémon card boom is being driven by nostalgia, blockbuster card sales and speculation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
